steps.title: Clear fractions
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $72cx$ to remove denominators: $$72=cx^{2}+72x \implies cx^{2}+72x-72=0.$$

steps.title: Apply the one-solution condition
steps.content: For exactly one solution, the discriminant is $0$: $72^{2}-4(c)(-72)=0$, so $5184+288c=0$ and $c=-18$. The answer is -18.
